content.title: 📚 Active Voice vs Passive Voice શું છે?

content.content: અંગ્રેજીમાં વાક્યમાં કર્તા (Subject) ક્રિયા (Verb) કરે છે અને કર્મ (Object) પર અસર થાય છે. આ ક્રિયા બે રીતે દર્શાવી શકાય છે:

content.title: 🔄 Active vs Passive Voice
rows:
She writes a letter.
(તેણી પત્ર લખે છે.)

A letter is written by her.
(પત્ર તેણી દ્વારા લખાય છે.)

content.content: યાદ રાખો: Passive Voice માં Object (કર્મ) વાક્યની શરૂઆતમાં આવે છે અને Subject (કર્તા) 'by' પછી આવે છે (અથવા છોડી દેવાય છે).
Active Voice માં Subject હોય તે Passive Voice માં Object (by પછી) તરીકે બદલાય છે:

content.title: 📋 Pronoun Conversion Table
rows: Who did this? → By whom was this done?

content.title: 🎯 Basic Structure
rows: Object + Helping Verb + V3 + by + Subject

content.content: મહત્વપૂર્ણ: Passive Voice માં હંમેશા V3 (Past Participle / ભૂતકૃદંત) વપરાય છે.

content.title: Simple Present Tense
rows:
She writes a letter.
(તેણી પત્ર લખે છે.)

A letter is written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાય છે.)
Object + am/is/are + not + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.

She does not write a letter.
(તેણી પત્ર લખતી નથી.)

A letter is not written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાતો નથી.)

Does she write a letter?
(શું તેણી પત્ર લખે છે?)

Is a letter written by her?
(શું તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાય છે?)

content.title: Simple Past Tense
rows:
She wrote a letter.
(તેણીએ પત્ર લખ્યો.)

A letter was written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાયો હતો.)
Object + was/were + not + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.

She did not write a letter.
(તેણીએ પત્ર લખ્યો ન હતો.)

A letter was not written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાયો ન હતો.)

Did she write a letter?
(શું તેણીએ પત્ર લખ્યો હતો?)

Was a letter written by her?
(શું તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાયો હતો?)

content.title: Simple Future Tense
rows: Object + will/shall + be + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.

She will write a letter.
(તેણી પત્ર લખશે.)

A letter will be written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાશે.)
Object + will/shall + not + be + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.

She will not write a letter.
(તેણી પત્ર લખશે નહીં.)

A letter will not be written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાશે નહીં.)
Will/Shall + Object + be + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.?

Will she write a letter?
(શું તેણી પત્ર લખશે?)

Will a letter be written by her?
(શું તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાશે?)

content.title: Present Continuous Tense
rows: Object + am/is/are + being + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.

She is writing a letter.
(તેણી પત્ર લખી રહી છે.)

A letter is being written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાઈ રહ્યો છે.)
Object + am/is/are + not + being + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.

She is not writing a letter.
(તેણી પત્ર લખી રહી નથી.)

A letter is not being written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાઈ રહ્યો નથી.)
Am/Is/Are + Object + being + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.?

Is she writing a letter?
(શું તેણી પત્ર લખી રહી છે?)

Is a letter being written by her?
(શું તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાઈ રહ્યો છે?)

content.title: Past Continuous Tense
rows: Object + was/were + being + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.

She was writing a letter.
(તેણી પત્ર લખી રહી હતી.)

A letter was being written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાઈ રહ્યો હતો.)
Object + was/were + not + being + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.

She was not writing a letter.
(તેણી પત્ર લખી રહી ન હતી.)

A letter was not being written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાઈ રહ્યો ન હતો.)
Was/Were + Object + being + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.?

Was she writing a letter?
(શું તેણી પત્ર લખી રહી હતી?)

Was a letter being written by her?
(શું તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાઈ રહ્યો હતો?)

content.content: Future Continuous Tense (ચાલુ ભવિષ્યકાળ) અને Perfect Continuous Tenses (ચાલુ પૂર્ણ કાળ) નું Passive Voice માં રૂપાંતર સામાન્ય રીતે થતું નથી.

content.title: Present Perfect Tense
rows: Object + have/has + been + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.

She has written a letter.
(તેણીએ પત્ર લખ્યો છે.)

A letter has been written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાયો છે.)
Object + have/has + not + been + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.

She has not written a letter.
(તેણીએ પત્ર લખ્યો નથી.)

A letter has not been written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાયો નથી.)
Have/Has + Object + been + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.?

Has she written a letter?
(શું તેણીએ પત્ર લખ્યો છે?)

Has a letter been written by her?
(શું તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાયો છે?)

content.title: Past Perfect Tense
rows: Object + had + been + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.

She had written a letter.
(તેણીએ પત્ર લખ્યો હતો.)

A letter had been written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાઈ ચૂક્યો હતો.)
Object + had + not + been + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.

She had not written a letter.
(તેણીએ પત્ર લખ્યો ન હતો.)

A letter had not been written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાયો ન હતો.)
Had + Object + been + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.?

Had she written a letter?
(શું તેણીએ પત્ર લખ્યો હતો?)

Had a letter been written by her?
(શું તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાઈ ચૂક્યો હતો?)

content.title: Future Perfect Tense
rows: Object + will/shall + have + been + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.

She will have written a letter.
(તેણીએ પત્ર લખી લીધો હશે.)

A letter will have been written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાઈ ગયો હશે.)
Subject + will/shall + not + have + V3 + Object + O.W.
Object + will/shall + not + have + been + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.

She will not have written a letter.
(તેણીએ પત્ર લખ્યો નહીં હોય.)

A letter will not have been written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાયો નહીં હોય.)
Will/Shall + Object + have + been + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.?

Will she have written a letter?
(શું તેણીએ પત્ર લખી લીધો હશે?)

Will a letter have been written by her?
(શું તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખાઈ ગયો હશે?)

content.title: Modals (can, could, should, must, may, might)
rows: Object + Modal + be + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.

She can write a letter.
(તેણી પત્ર લખી શકે છે.)

A letter can be written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખી શકાય છે.)
Object + Modal + not + be + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.

She cannot write a letter.
(તેણી પત્ર લખી શકતી નથી.)

A letter cannot be written by her.
(તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખી શકાતો નથી.)
Modal + Object + be + V3 + by + Subject + O.W.?

Can she write a letter?
(શું તેણી પત્ર લખી શકે છે?)

Can a letter be written by her?
(શું તેણી દ્વારા પત્ર લખી શકાય છે?)

content.content: કર્મ જાણવા પૂછાયેલા પ્રશ્નોનું Passive Voice કર્મ જાણવા સામાન્ય રીતે whom કે what થી પ્રશ્ન પૂછાય છે. આ ઉપરાંત How many + નામ, Howmuch + નામ, Which + નામ, Whose + નામથી પણ પ્રશ્ન પૂછાયેલો હોય છે.

મુદ્દા ધ્યાનમાં રાખો:
1. જો પ્રશ્ન whomથી પૂછાયો હોય તો Passive વાક્યની શરૂઆતમાં who મૂકો. અન્ય કોઈ સર્વનામથી પ્રશ્ન પૂછાયો હોય તો તે જ સર્વનામ Passive વાક્યની શરૂઆતમાં મૂકો.
2. ત્યાર પછી તે સર્વનામને અનુરૂપ જે તે કાળનું સહાયકારી ક્રિયાપદ મૂકો. દા.ત., is, am, are, was, were, has, have, can, may વગેરે.
3. ત્યારબાદ Passive ક્રિયાપદ તરીકે ભૂતકૃદંત, be ભૂતકૃદંત, been ભૂતકૃદંત, being ભૂતકૃદંત મૂકો.
4. પછી by સાથે કર્તાને વિભક્તિના રૂપમાં મૂકો. દા.ત., I હોય તો by me, I હોય તો I, her હોય તો she મૂકી પછી Passive ક્રિયાપદ ભૂતકૃદંત મૂકો. પછી by સાથે અસલ કર્તાને મૂકો. દા.ત., કર્તા we હોય તો by us કર્તા he હોય તો by him મૂકો. છેલ્લે અન્ય શબ્દો મૂકો.

content:
Active: Which song is she singing now?
Passive: Which song is being sung by her now?

Active: Whose book have you read recently?
Passive: Whose book has been read by you recently?

Active: How much milk will she buy tomorrow?
Passive: How much milk will be bought by her tomorrow?

Active: Whom did you give your book yesterday? (દ્વિકર્મક વાક્ય)
Passive: Who was given your book by you yesterday?
Passive: To whom was your book given yesterday by you?

Active: What did you give him yesterday?
Passive: What was given to him by you yesterday?

content.content: કર્મ જાણવા માટેના આવા વાક્યોમાં A.V. માં સ.ક્રિ. + કર્તા + મુ.ક્રિ. એક સાથે (સે.ગ.) જોવા મળશે. વાક્ય 1 માં A.V. માં is she singing માં વચ્ચે she છે જે P.V. માં is being sung થાય છે.
કર્તા, કર્મ સિવાય વાક્યમાં અન્ય શબ્દોમાં આવતી માહિતી મેળવવા Where, why, when સિવાય પણ at what time, How, howlong જેવા પ્રશ્નાર્થવાળાથી પ્રશ્નો પૂછી શકાય છે.

content:
Active: When had she purchased new dress?
Passive: When had new dress been purchased by her?

Active: Why are you punishing him?
Passive: Why is he being punished by you?

Active: Where have you put my hat?
Passive: Where has my hat been put by you?

Active: With whom did you visit the zoo yesterday?
Passive: With whom was the zoo visited by you yesterday?

content.content: સૌપ્રથમ જે તે પ્રશ્નાર્થ વાચક સર્વનામને વાક્યની શરૂઆતમાં મૂકો. પછી કર્મ પ્રમાણે એકવચન કે બહુવચન, જે તે કાળનું સહાયકારી ક્રિયાપદ મૂકો. દા.ત., is, am, are, was, were, have, has વગેરે પછી કર્મને મૂકો. જો સર્વનામ હોય તો તેને કર્મ વિભક્તિમાં મૂકો. દા.ત., કર્તા we હોય તો by us કર્તા he હોય તો by him મૂકો. છેલ્લે અન્ય શબ્દો મૂકો.
Sentences without object (કર્મ વગરના વાક્યો)
આવાં વાક્યોનું Passive Voice કરતી વખતે You are ordered, requested, advised, warned, suggestedનો ઉપયોગ કરી પછી to મુકવાનું અને to પછી ક્રિયાપદનું V1 મૂળરૂપ વાપરવાનું આવે છે.

content:
Active: Stop talking.
Passive: You are ordered to stop talking.

Active: Please sit down.
Passive: You are requested to sit down.

Active: Don't talk, please.
Passive: You are requested not to talk.

Active: Work hard.
Passive: You are advised to work hard.

content.content: નોંધ: કર્મ વગરના Active આજ્ઞાર્થ વાક્યોનું Passive કરતી વખતે You are + જરૂર મુજબનું ભૂતકૃદંત (V³) વાપરવામાં આવે છે.
Sentences with objects (કર્મવાળાં આજ્ઞાર્થ વાક્યો)

content:
Active: Turn off the lights.
Passive: Let the lights be turned off.

Active: Do the work now.
Passive: Let the work be done now.

Active: Help the poor.
Passive: Let the poor be helped.

Active: Don't cut the trees.
Passive: Let the trees not be cut.

Active: We should obey the traffic rules.
Passive: The traffic rules should be obeyed by us.

content.content: નોંધ: કર્મવાળાં આજ્ઞાર્થ વાક્યોનું Passive સામાન્ય રીતે Let + કર્મ + be + V³ ના વાક્ય રચના મુજબ થાય છે. પ્રસંગોપાત કર્મ + should + be + V³ પણ વપરાય છે.

We thought that the meeting was canceled. (Active)
It was thought that the meeting was canceled. (Passive)
The meeting was thought to be canceled. (Passive)
Let + કર્મ + be + V³ ની વાક્ય રચના મુજબ થાય છે. પ્રસંગોપાત કર્મ + should + be + V³ પણ વપરાય છે.
Let થી શરૂ થતાં વાક્યો

content:
Active: Let me check your report.
Passive: Let your report be checked by me.

Active: Let them play a new game.
Passive: Let a new game be played by them.

Active: Let's start the meeting.
Passive: Let the meeting be started.

Active: Let her finish the drawing.
Passive: Let the drawing be finished by her.

content.content: Get (વિનંતીથી કામ કરાવવા માટે વપરાય છે.)

વાક્ય રચના
Active: પ્રેરક કર્તા + get નું રૂપ + કર્તા + to મૂળરૂપ + કર્મ + અન્ય શબ્દો.
Passive: પ્રેરક કર્તા + get નું રૂપ + કર્મ + ભૂતકૃદંત + by + કર્તા + અન્ય શબ્દો.

content:
Active: I got the secretary to send my email yesterday.
Passive: I got my email sent by the secretary yesterday.

Active: The manager gets the staff to sign the documents.
Passive: The manager gets the documents signed by the staff.

content.content: Have (નાણાં ચૂકવીને કામ કરાવવા વપરાય છે.)

Active: પ્રેરક કર્તા + have નું રૂપ + કર્તા + મૂળરૂપ + કર્મ + અન્ય શબ્દો.
Passive: પ્રેરક કર્તા + have નું રૂપ + કર્મ + ભૂતકૃદંત + by + કર્તા + અન્ય શબ્દો.

content:
Active: I had the assistant check my schedule.
Passive: I had my schedule checked by the assistant.

content.content:
Active વાક્યમાં to મૂળરૂપ (V¹) વપરાય છે.
Passive વાક્યમાં to be + ભૂતકૃદંત (V³) વપરાય છે.

content:
Active: I want the engineer to repair this machine.
Passive: I want this machine to be repaired by the engineer.

Active: She wanted me to complete the report.
Passive: She wanted the report to be completed by me.

Active: He likes the students to study hard.
Passive: He likes hard study to be done by the students.

Active: The sum is too difficult to solve.
Passive: The sum is too difficult to be solved.

Active: Do you want the mechanic to check your car?
Passive: Do you want your car to be checked by the mechanic?

content.title: To be to / Have to વાળાં વાક્યો

content:
Active: I am to buy a new house next month.
Passive: A new house is to be bought by me next month.

Active: We were to attend the ceremony.
Passive: The ceremony was to be attended by us.

Active: My sister has to deliver a speech.
Passive: A speech has to be delivered by my sister.

Active: They had to finish the painting.
Passive: The painting had to be finished by them.

Active: The needy had to help.
Passive: The needy had to be helped by us.
We had to help the needy. (Active)

content.title: Need / Require / Want + ing વાળાં વાક્યો

content:
Active: Your phone needs charging.
Passive: Your phone needs to be charged.

Active: My bike requires servicing.
Passive: My bike requires to be serviced.

Active: The plants want watering.
Passive: The plants want to be watered.

content.content: It થી શરૂ થતાં વાક્યો (આવા વાક્યોનું Passive voice કરતી વખતે for ઉમેરવું પડે છે.)

content:
Active: It is impossible to finish this task today.
Passive: It is impossible for this task to be finished today.

Active: It is time to start the show.
Passive: It is time for the show to be started.

content.title: They say / believe / hope / think વાળાં વાક્યો

content:
Active: They believe that the politician is honest.
Passive: It is believed that the politician is honest.
Passive: The politician is believed to be honest.

Active: I hope he will succeed in the competition.
Passive: It is hoped that he will succeed in the competition.
Passive: He is hoped to succeed in the competition.

content.title: 🚫 ક્યારે Passive Voice ન થઈ શકે?

content.content: નીચેના Tenses નું Passive Voice સામાન્ય રીતે થતું નથી:

content.title: ❌ No Passive Voice
rows: She will be writing a letter. (No Passive)
She has been writing a letter. (No Passive)
She had been writing a letter. (No Passive)
She will have been writing. (No Passive)

content.content:
Intransitive Verbs (અકર્મક ક્રિયાપદ) નું Passive Voice થતું નથી કારણ કે તેમાં કર્મ હોતું નથી.
દા.ત., go, come, sit, stand, sleep, die, laugh, cry વગેરે.
❌ He went to school. → Passive ન થાય.

content.title: 🔄 by vs with Confusion
rows: The letter was written with a pen.

content:
Active: She cut the apple with a knife.
Passive: The apple was cut with a knife by her.

Active: The police arrested the thief.
Passive: The thief was arrested by the police.

content.title: 🚫 Avoid These Mistakes
rows: The letter was wrote by her.
A letter is write by me.
The book was given by I.
She is being help by us.

content.title: 🔄 Tense-wise Passive Voice Structure
rows: She will write → will be written
will have + V3 → will have + been + V3
will have written → will have been written

content.title: 🎯 Modal Verbs Passive
rows: have to write → have to be written

content.title: 📝 Special Structures
rows: Close the door → Let the door be closed
Let him do it → Let it be done by him
Get him to repair → Get it repaired
needs repairing → needs to be repaired
They believe → It is believed that...
Did she write? → Was it written by her?

content.title: 🔑 Key Rules (મહત્વના નિયમો)
rows: Passive માં હંમેશા Past Participle (V3) વપરાય
I→me, We→us, He→him, She→her, They→them, Who→whom
go, come, sit, sleep, die, laugh ← Passive ન થાય
Present/Past/Future Perfect Continuous ← Passive ન થાય

summary_table.title: Tense-wise Active to Passive Voice Summary
rows:
V1 / V1 (s, es) / do / does
She writes a letter.

am / is / are + V3
A letter is written by her.

V2 / did
She wrote a letter.

was / were + V3
A letter was written by her.

will / shall + V1
She will write a letter.

will / shall + be + V3
A letter will be written by her.

am / is / are + V1-ing
She is writing a letter.

am / is / are + being + V3
A letter is being written by her.

was / were + V1-ing
She was writing a letter.

was / were + being + V3
A letter was being written by her.

will / shall + be + V1-ing
She will be writing a letter.

have / has + V3
She has written a letter.

have / has + been + V3
A letter has been written by her.

had + V3
She had written a letter.

had + been + V3
A letter had been written by her.

will / shall + have + V3
She will have written a letter.

will / shall + have + been + V3
A letter will have been written by her.

have / has / had / will have + been + V1-ing
She has been writing a letter.

can, could, should, etc. + V1
She can write a letter.

can, could, should, etc. + be + V3
A letter can be written by her.
